interface.longDescription: Tier 2 Farplane harness placement advisor. Use when the user wants to make Farplane better at something and needs a grounded recommendation for whether to change AGENTS.md, global templates, skills, subagents, hooks/scripts, ticket contracts, docs/specs, validators, or registries.
